name: gear-tracker-workflows
description: Repo-specific workflows for Gear Tracker planning, page ownership, API hardening, Prisma and Neon migrations, iOS slices, deployment recovery, and shipping discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Focused repo workflows for planning, hardening, migrations, UI passes, iOS slices, deploy recovery, and shipping.
interface.longDescription: Use Gear Tracker Workflows to run source-grounded plans, page ownership passes, API hardening audits, Prisma and Neon migration work, iOS implementation slices, deployment recovery, post-merge cleanup, and scoped ship workflows with the repo's docs, tests, and Vercel constraints baked in.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a Gear Tracker workflow such as /gt-plan, /gt-page, /gt-api-hardening, /gt-migrate, /gt-ios-slice, /gt-deploy-debug, /gt-clean-after-merge, or /gt-ship.
